name: Beef~ Pepper & Mushroom Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Boneless beef top sirloin, cut into 1-1/4 inches thick steaks
1 medium Green, red or yellow bell pepper, cut into 1-1/4 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from beef top sirloin steak and cut into 1-1/4 inch pieces.
2. Whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, water, Dijon-style mustard, honey, crushed oregano, and black pepper in a large bowl.
3. Add beef, bell pepper, and mushrooms to the mixture; turn to coat evenly.
4. Thread alternating pieces of beef, bell pepper, and mushrooms onto four 12-inch metal skewers.
5. Place kabobs on a rack in a broiler pan with the surface of the meat 3 to 4 inches from the heat source.
6. Broil for 9 to 12 minutes, turning occasionally, until desired doneness is reached.
7. Season with salt if desired.
Makes 4 servings.
